'''Kojash''' was one of two [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colonies on the perimeter of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], founded by the [[Morath]]. Along with the other settlement on [[Elcorth]], it was conquered and depopulated by the [[Yevetha]] during the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]].<ref name="CSWE" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Kojash should not be confused with [[Kokash sector/Legends|Kokash sector]].
